issues_found.issue: WaitForThreadpoolWorkCallbacks semantics blocks until callback STARTS not COMPLETES
issues_found.description: WaitForThreadpoolWorkCallbacks work FALSE blocks caller until callback begins. Callback may still be RUNNING when CloseThreadpoolWork is called.
issues_found.expected_fix: Option A Remove WaitForThreadpoolWorkCallbacks. Option B Use TRUE.

issues_found.issue: Lambda captures iterator causing race condition
issues_found.description: Lambda captures iterator it by value. CleanupCompletedRequests may erase request invalidating iterator.

issues_found.issue: Async caching design intent violated - main thread blocked
issues_found.description: WaitForThreadpoolWorkCallbacks work FALSE BLOCKS caller violating async design.

summary: Round 3 Agent 3 review: WaitForThreadpoolWorkCallbacks semantics issue. CloseThreadpoolWork may interrupt running callback. Iterator capture race condition. Remove WaitForThreadpoolWorkCallbacks for async or use TRUE for sync.
